title: Phone Repair 修手机
scene: 在手机维修店修理手机

lines.en: Hi. What seems to be the problem with your phone?
lines.zh: 嗨。您的手机出了什么问题？

lines.en: The screen is cracked and the battery dies really fast.
lines.zh: 屏幕裂了，而且电池耗电很快。

lines.en: Let me take a quick look at it.
Yes, the screen is badly damaged. The battery is also worn out.
lines.zh: 是的，屏幕损坏很严重。电池也老化了。

lines.en: How much will it cost to replace both?
The screen replacement is eighty dollars and the battery is forty.
lines.zh: 换屏幕八十美元，换电池四十美元。

lines.en: That's reasonable. How long will the repair take?
lines.zh: 价格还可以。修好多长时间？

lines.en: I can have it ready for you in about an hour.
lines.zh: 大约一个小时后就能修好。

lines.en: Great. Will you back up my data first?
lines.zh: 好的。您会先备份我的数据吗？

lines.en: Yes, we always back up data before doing any repairs.
lines.zh: 是的，我们在维修前都会备份数据的。
